name: TravelGuide — Grok airport maintenance
description: Daily cloud agent that uses Grok through Vercel AI Gateway to generate missing airport pages and refresh stale traveler tips.

workflow.prompt:
You maintain TravelGuide in this repository — one practical Markdown page per airport under content/airports/.

Each run:
1. Run: pnpm maintain:airports --generate-limit 3 --review-limit 5
   (AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY is available in the environment.)
2. Inspect generated or updated Markdown files for malformed YAML, placeholder URLs, empty sections, or invented-looking facts.
3. Preserve the existing page heading structure and bentoTips frontmatter used by the app.
4. Do not overwrite unrelated manual edits.

Quality gate:
- Grok must run through Vercel AI Gateway; the script also attaches Gateway web search for current online data.
- Prefer official airport, transport authority, airline, and alliance URLs in sources.
- Skip the run if AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY is missing — report that instead.

If new airport pages or material tip updates were created, open a pull request titled "feat(airports): refresh Grok airport guides" with a bullet per airport.
If nothing changed, reply with a short status note — do not open a PR.
